gigapan.name: Canal, London, UK (d1a)
gigapan.description:
A virtual copy of another of my images.  I was attempting to do something towards high dynamic range (hdr) imagery.
The other image has a grey dreary sky, which wasn't literally the case when I took my images...but at a larger level, it _might_ have been the statement I was interested in making.
Hard to tell, really.  I am now gearing up (largely 'mentally') to be able to kick these panos up a level.  To do things like preprocess the soure images for saturation and white balance and whatever else matters.  But since it takes so long to take and stitch even a conventional gigapan I just don't know...
